input.question: How has the average grade changed over academic years?

payload.question: How has the average grade changed over academic years?

output.reasoning: Compute a numeric grade per enrollment by using a numeric grade_value when it is purely numeric, otherwise falling back to the average of available numeric score components (exam_score, project_score, attendance_score). Then aggregate the average numeric grade per course_sections.academic_year and order by academic_year.
output.sql:
WITH grade_numbers AS (
  SELECT
    cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
    CASE
      WHEN g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN g.grade_value::numeric
      WHEN (g.exam_score IS NOT NULL OR g.project_score IS NOT NULL OR g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL)
        THEN (
          COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)
        ) / NULLIF(
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
           + CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
           + CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
          0
        )
      ELSE NULL
    END AS grade_numeric
  FROM public.course_sections cs
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
)
SELECT
  academic_year AS academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(grade_numeric)::numeric, 3) AS average_grade
FROM grade_numbers
WHERE grade_numeric IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY academic_year
ORDER BY academic_year;
assumptions: course_sections.academic_year is the academic year to report by
grade_value may contain numeric strings (e.g., '85' or '85.5') or non-numeric letters; numeric strings are taken as final grade
If grade_value is not numeric, use the average of available numeric components (exam_score, project_score, attendance_score) for that enrollment
academic_year ordering is lexicographic (e.g., '2020-2021') which should reflect chronological order in this dataset

payload.sql:
WITH grade_numbers AS (
  SELECT
    cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
    CASE
      WHEN g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN g.grade_value::numeric
      WHEN (g.exam_score IS NOT NULL OR g.project_score IS NOT NULL OR g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL)
        THEN (
          COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)
        ) / NULLIF(
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
           + CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
           + CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
          0
        )
      ELSE NULL
    END AS grade_numeric
  FROM public.course_sections cs
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
)
SELECT
  academic_year AS academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(grade_numeric)::numeric, 3) AS average_grade
FROM grade_numbers
WHERE grade_numeric IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY academic_year
ORDER BY academic_year;
